SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c0.department_id = d.department_id
WHERE c0.department_id = @departmentId

    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id

    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s

SELECT c.history_id, c.changed_by, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.escalation_level_snapshot, c.new_handler_employee_id, c.new_status_id, c.old_handler_employee_id, c.old_status_id, c.remarks, c.role_id_at_action_time, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, c1.status_id, c1.is_terminal, c1.status_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, e1.employee_id, e1.created_at, e1.department_id, e1.email, e1.employee_name, e1.is_active, e1.mobile_number, e1.password_hash, e1.role_id, e1.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name
FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.changed_by = e1.employee_id
LEFT JOIN roles AS r ON c.role_id_at_action_time = r.role_id
WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId
ORDER BY c.created_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.status_id AS status_id0, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id AS priority_id0, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c1.category_id AS category_id0, c1.category_name, c1.created_at AS created_at0, c1.default_priority_id, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.sla_hours, c1.updated_at AS updated_at0, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at1, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at1, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at2, e.department_id AS department_id1, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active AS is_active1, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at2, e0.employee_id AS employee_id0, e0.created_at AS created_at3, e0.department_id AS department_id2, e0.email AS email0, e0.employee_name AS employee_name0, e0.is_active AS is_active2, e0.mobile_number AS mobile_number0, e0.password_hash AS password_hash0, e0.role_id AS role_id0, e0.updated_at AS updated_at3
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.changed_by = e1.employee_id

WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId
ORDER BY c.created_at

    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id

FROM complaint_escalations AS c

LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.escalated_by_employee_id = e0.employee_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.escalated_to_employee_id = e1.employee_id
WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId
ORDER BY c.escalated_at

FROM complaint_history AS c

INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id

WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId

    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id

SELECT c.history_id, c.changed_by, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.escalation_level_snapshot, c.new_handler_employee_id, c.new_status_id, c.old_handler_employee_id, c.old_status_id, c.remarks, c.role_id_at_action_time, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, c1.status_id, c1.is_terminal, c1.status_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, e1.employee_id, e1.created_at, e1.department_id, e1.email, e1.employee_name, e1.is_active, e1.mobile_number, e1.password_hash, e1.role_id, e1.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name
FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.changed_by = e1.employee_id
LEFT JOIN roles AS r ON c.role_id_at_action_time = r.role_id
WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId
ORDER BY c.created_at

FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
WHERE c.escalation_due_at <= now() AND c.status_id <> 6 AND c.status_id <> 7 AND c.status_id <> 9 AND c.status_id <> 5

    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.status_id AS status_id0, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id AS priority_id0, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c1.category_id AS category_id0, c1.category_name, c1.created_at AS created_at0, c1.default_priority_id, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.sla_hours, c1.updated_at AS updated_at0, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at1, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at1, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at2, e.department_id AS department_id1, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active AS is_active1, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at2, e0.employee_id AS employee_id0, e0.created_at AS created_at3, e0.department_id AS department_id2, e0.email AS email0, e0.employee_name AS employee_name0, e0.is_active AS is_active2, e0.mobile_number AS mobile_number0, e0.password_hash AS password_hash0, e0.role_id AS role_id0, e0.updated_at AS updated_at3
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

FROM complaint_escalations AS c
LEFT JOIN escalation_rules AS e ON c.escalation_rule_id = e.escalation_rule_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.escalated_by_employee_id = e0.employee_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.escalated_to_employee_id = e1.employee_id
WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId

FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.changed_by = e1.employee_id
LEFT JOIN roles AS r ON c.role_id_at_action_time = r.role_id
WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId
ORDER BY c.created_at

FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.changed_by = e1.employee_id
LEFT JOIN roles AS r ON c.role_id_at_action_time = r.role_id
WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId
ORDER BY c.created_at

    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.escalated_by_employee_id = e0.employee_id

WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId
ORDER BY c.escalated_at

SELECT c.history_id, c.changed_by, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.escalation_level_snapshot, c.new_handler_employee_id, c.new_status_id, c.old_handler_employee_id, c.old_status_id, c.remarks, c.role_id_at_action_time, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, c1.status_id, c1.is_terminal, c1.status_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, e1.employee_id, e1.created_at, e1.department_id, e1.email, e1.employee_name, e1.is_active, e1.mobile_number, e1.password_hash, e1.role_id, e1.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name
FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.changed_by = e1.employee_id
LEFT JOIN roles AS r ON c.role_id_at_action_time = r.role_id
WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId
ORDER BY c.created_at

INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id

    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.status_id AS status_id0, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id AS priority_id0, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c1.category_id AS category_id0, c1.category_name, c1.created_at AS created_at0, c1.default_priority_id, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.sla_hours, c1.updated_at AS updated_at0, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at1, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at1, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at2, e.department_id AS department_id1, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active AS is_active1, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at2, e0.employee_id AS employee_id0, e0.created_at AS created_at3, e0.department_id AS department_id2, e0.email AS email0, e0.employee_name AS employee_name0, e0.is_active AS is_active2, e0.mobile_number AS mobile_number0, e0.password_hash AS password_hash0, e0.role_id AS role_id0, e0.updated_at AS updated_at3
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.status_id AS status_id0, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id AS priority_id0, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c1.category_id AS category_id0, c1.category_name, c1.created_at AS created_at0, c1.default_priority_id, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.sla_hours, c1.updated_at AS updated_at0, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at1, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at1, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at2, e.department_id AS department_id1, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active AS is_active1, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at2, e0.employee_id AS employee_id0, e0.created_at AS created_at3, e0.department_id AS department_id2, e0.email AS email0, e0.employee_name AS employee_name0, e0.is_active AS is_active2, e0.mobile_number AS mobile_number0, e0.password_hash AS password_hash0, e0.role_id AS role_id0, e0.updated_at AS updated_at3
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id

WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId
ORDER BY c.created_at

2026-06-23 07:44:20.535 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[@isActive_Value='?' (DbType = Boolean)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at
FROM departments AS d
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON d.department_head_employee_id = e.employee_id

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id

INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id

FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id

FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id

    FROM complaints AS c

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.status_id AS status_id0, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id AS priority_id0, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c1.category_id AS category_id0, c1.category_name, c1.created_at AS created_at0, c1.default_priority_id, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.sla_hours, c1.updated_at AS updated_at0, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at1, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at1, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at2, e.department_id AS department_id1, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active AS is_active1, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at2, e0.employee_id AS employee_id0, e0.created_at AS created_at3, e0.department_id AS department_id2, e0.email AS email0, e0.employee_name AS employee_name0, e0.is_active AS is_active2, e0.mobile_number AS mobile_number0, e0.password_hash AS password_hash0, e0.role_id AS role_id0, e0.updated_at AS updated_at3
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

FROM complaint_history AS c

INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.status_id AS status_id0, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id AS priority_id0, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c1.category_id AS category_id0, c1.category_name, c1.created_at AS created_at0, c1.default_priority_id, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.sla_hours, c1.updated_at AS updated_at0, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at1, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at1, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at2, e.department_id AS department_id1, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active AS is_active1, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at2, e0.employee_id AS employee_id0, e0.created_at AS created_at3, e0.department_id AS department_id2, e0.email AS email0, e0.employee_name AS employee_name0, e0.is_active AS is_active2, e0.mobile_number AS mobile_number0, e0.password_hash AS password_hash0, e0.role_id AS role_id0, e0.updated_at AS updated_at3
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

FROM complaint_escalations AS c

FROM complaint_history AS c

INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id

FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.changed_by = e1.employee_id
LEFT JOIN roles AS r ON c.role_id_at_action_time = r.role_id
WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId

FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id

FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.changed_by = e1.employee_id

WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId

FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.changed_by = e1.employee_id
LEFT JOIN roles AS r ON c.role_id_at_action_time = r.role_id
WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId

    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
WHERE c.escalation_due_at <= now() AND c.status_id <> 6 AND c.status_id <> 7 AND c.status_id <> 9 AND c.status_id <> 5
